ARIA role presentation is not allowed for given element

findings.title: Buttons must have discernible text
findings.actual_results:
Ensure buttons have discernible text

URL: https://www.samcomf.com/career

Element does not have inner text that is visible to screen readers aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element has no title attribute Element does not have an implicit (wrapped) <label> Element does not have an explicit <label> Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"
- "button" in "Discover Your Future at Samco Mutual Fund"

Element does not have inner text that is visible to screen readers aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element has no title attribute Element does not have an implicit (wrapped) <label> Element does not have an explicit <label> Element's role is not presentational because it is focusable
- "button" in "Employee Spotlight"

any.message: Element does not have inner text that is visible to screen readers
aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
Element has no title attribute
Element does not have an implicit (wrapped) <label>
Element does not have an explicit <label>
Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"

findings.title: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.actual_results:
URL: https://www.samcomf.com/career

Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.73 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #4788c8, font size: 10.5pt (14px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "Distributor corner" in "header"
- "Contact us" in "header"
- "+91 63572 22000" in "header"

Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.73 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #4788c8, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "New Investor" in "header"

Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.97 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #007bff, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "Current Openings" in "Discover Your Future at Samco Mutual Fund"
- "#drop_resume" in "Careers"

Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.84 (foreground color: #999999, background color: #ffffff, font size: 11.3pt (15px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "Head - Investor Services" in "Employee Spotlight"

Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.82 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #3f86cc, font size: 9.8pt (13px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "Copyright © 2024 Samco Asset Management Private Ltd. | All Rights Reserved" in "page section"

Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.82 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #3f86cc, font size: 9.0pt (12px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "Statutory Details" in "page section"
- "Terms & Conditions" in "page section"
- "Privacy Policy" in "page section"
- "Disclaimer" in "page section"
findings.incorrect_code:
Distributor corner Contact us +91 63572 22000 New Investor Current Openings
  • Company Secretary and Compliance officer
  • Head - Investor Services
    • Copyright © 2024 Samco Asset Management Private Ltd. | All Rights Reserved
    Statutory Details Terms & Conditions Privacy Policy Disclaimer
findings.recommendation: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds

findings.title: Images must have alternative text
findings.actual_results: Ensure elements have alternative text or a role of none or presentation URL: https://www.samcomf.com/career Element does not have an alt attribute aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element has no title attribute Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation" - "img" in "Discover Your Future at Samco Mutual Fund" - "img" in "Employee Spotlight"

findings.title: Alternative text of images should not be repeated as text
findings.wcag_name: Alternative text of images should not be repeated as text
findings.actual_results: Ensure image alternative is not repeated as text URL: https://www.samcomf.com/career Element contains element with alt text that duplicates existing text - "Easy & quick" in "Filing Complaints on SCORES"
findings.recommendation: Alternative text of images should not be repeated as text

none.message: Element contains element with alt text that duplicates existing text

raw_nodes.failureSummary: Fix all of the following: Element contains element with alt text that duplicates existing text

findings.title: Form elements must have labels
findings.actual_results:
Ensure every form element has a label

URL: https://www.samcomf.com/career

Element does not have an implicit (wrapped) <label> Element does not have an explicit <label> aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element has no title attribute Element has an empty placeholder attribute Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"
- "candidate_name" in "section#career_application_form"
- "candidate_phone" in "section#career_application_form"
- "candidate_email" in "section#career_application_form"
- "candidate_location" in "section#career_application_form"
- "candidate_experience_in_years" in "section#career_application_form"
- "candidate_relevant_experience" in "section#career_application_form"
- "notice_period" in "section#career_application_form"
- "department_position" in "section#career_application_form"
findings.incorrect_code:
<input type="text" id="candidate_name" name="candidate_name" class="form-input validate-input-login-form" placeholder="" value="">

<input type="tel" id="candidate_phone" name="candidate_phone" class="form-input validate-input-login-form" placeholder="" value="" pattern="[0-9]{10}" required="">

<input type="email" id="candidate_email" name="candidate_email" class="form-input validate-input-login-form" placeholder="" value="">

<input type="text" id="candidate_location" name="candidate_location" class="form-input validate-input-login-form" placeholder="" value="">

<input type="text" id="candidate_experience_in_years" name="candidate_experience_in_years" class="form-input validate-input-login-form" placeholder="" value="">

<input type="text" id="candidate_relevant_experience" name="candidate_relevant_experience" class="form-input validate-input-login-form" placeholder="" value="">

<input type="text" id="notice_period" name="notice_period" class="form-input validate-input-login-form" placeholder="" value="">

<input type="text" id="department_position" name="department_position" class="form-input validate-input-login-form" placeholder="" value="">

Element has no title attribute
Element has an empty placeholder attribute

Current Openings

Employee Spotlight

Careers

If you're passionate about finance, eager to learn, and driven to make a difference, we want to hear from you. Explore our current job openings and take the next step in your career by joining Samco Mutual Fund.

At Samco Mutual Fund, you'll not only be part of a successful and reputable organization but also have the chance to shape your own future. We look forward to welcoming you to our team and helping you achieve your career goals.

Please take a moment to fill out the following details, our team will be in touch with you as soon as possible

findings.title: All touch targets must be 24px large, or leave sufficient space
findings.wcag_name: All touch targets must be 24px large, or leave sufficient space
findings.actual_results:
Ensure touch targets have sufficient size and space

URL: https://www.samcomf.com/career

Target has insufficient size (12px by 12px, should be at least 24px by 24px) Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 12px instead of at least 24px.
- "button" in "Discover Your Future at Samco Mutual Fund"
